title: Add 'huzluxe.in' website domain display to the site

requirements.text: Display the website domain 'huzluxe.in' visibly on the site. Add it as a clickable link (href='https://huzluxe.in') in a prominent but complementary position — for example, as a domain badge near the Navigation logo, a styled link in the HeroSection alongside the 'HUZLUXE' brand badge, or in the ContactFooter alongside the existing contact details. Style it consistently with the existing dark charcoal and warm amber design system (e.g., amber-colored text or badge). Ensure it appears in at least one clearly visible location.
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'huzluxe.in' is visible on the site in at least one location
The domain is rendered as a clickable link pointing to https://huzluxe.in
The domain display is styled consistently with the dark charcoal and warm amber design system
The placement does not disrupt existing layout or navigation

constraints: Do not change existing branding — 'HUZLUXE' and 'Welcome to the Future' must remain intact
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not alter the contact form or mailto:huzzu006@gmail.com functionality
nonGoals: Registering or configuring the huzluxe.in domain
